---
title: "Getting Started with analysiskmeans!"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Getting Started with analysiskmeans!}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

```{r setup}
library(analysiskmeans)
```

## Welcome!

Welcome to this brand new, super exciting, R package! Whether you are here to conduct Kmeans clustering, get PCA results, or create an elbow plot, you've come to the right package!

## Get Started With Installation 

Move to Package Installation [Here](../articles/package-install.html)!

````
library(analysiskmeans)
```
